TUNESTRAIN-TUNE_STRAIN_BIAS_POWER.title: Tune Strain · Bias
TUNESTRAIN-TUNE_STRAIN_BIAS_POWER.descri: When Resonance Break triggers, this is converted into [gold]Tune Strain · Interference[/gold].
TUNESTRAIN-TUNE_STRAIN_BIAS_POWER.smartD: When Resonance Break triggers, this is converted into Tune Strain · Interference.
TUNESTRAIN-TUNE_STRAIN_INTERFERENCE_POWE: Increases the damage players deal to this monster. The higher the Tune Strain · Bias and Tune Strain Response stacks are, the larger the damage bonus. Tune Strain · Bias cannot be applied to this target. Lasts 3 turns.

Increases the damage players deal to this monster. The higher the Tune Strain · Bias and Tune Strain Response stacks are, the larger the damage bonus. Tune Strain · Bias cannot be applied to this target. Lasts 3 turns.
TUNESTRAIN-TUNE_STRAIN_RESPONSE_POWER.de: When Tune Strain Resonance Break triggers, this is set to the total number of cards in your deck with [gold]Tune Strain Response[/gold]. Higher stacks increase the damage bonus from [gold]Tune Strain · Interference[/gold]. Lasts 3 turns.
TUNESTRAIN-TUNE_STRAIN_RESPONSE_POWER.sm: When Tune Strain Resonance Break triggers, this is set to the total number of cards in your deck with Tune Strain Response. Higher stacks increase the damage bonus from Tune Strain · Interference. Lasts 3 turns.
